name: smooth-surfer
description: Surf the web with only the waves you want.

scripts.check: node --check src/settings.js && node --check src/storage.js && node --check src/background.js && node --check src/content.js && node --check src/popup.js && node tests/settings.test.js && node tests/manifest.test.js && node tests/background.test.js && node tests/chrome-smoke.test.mjs
scripts.package: mkdir -p dist && rm -f dist/smooth-surfer.zip && zip -r dist/smooth-surfer.zip manifest.json popup.html src icons
